item.title: A message from Mrs Kwok and Mme Perron:
item.description: We're so excited for our student panellists to bring Elevate and Empower to life this morning! We wish them the best of luck and are praying for a fun and successful event. Students who have signed up for the event are asked to report to period 2 for attendance and then please wait to be called down.

item.title: A message from Ms. Clouthier:
item.description: Thank you to all 7&8 Boys who came to the basketball tryouts these past two weeks. You all worked very hard, demonstrated your skills and made selecting the team extremely difficult. The team list will be posted later today, so please check the Athletics board on your way to period 4. Those who made the team, please come see Ms. Clouthier (room 244) before your go home today for your permission form for our games next week at RHS.
